title: Automated Image & Banner Generation Inside monday.com
excerpt: I’d love to see an automated image generation feature or integration within monday.com. Many teams—especially in marketing, sales, and eCommerce—frequently need to create social media graphics, ad creatives, branded bann…

posts.author: bustbrainlabs (BustBrain Labs)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d love to see an automated image generation feature or integration within monday.com. Many teams—especially in marketing, sales, and eCommerce—frequently need to create social media graphics, ad creatives, branded banners, and product visuals. Instead of manually designing these assets, an automation tool that pulls data from monday.com boards and generates images dynamically would save tons of time.

Use Case Examples

  1. Marketing Teams – Auto-generate social media posts and ad creatives based on campaign details in a Monday board.
  2. E-commerce Businesses – Create product banners with updated pricing and images, pulled directly from Monday data.
  3. Sales Teams – Generate personalized outreach banners with client names and details.
  4. HR & Internal Comms – Automatically design event posters, announcements, or recruitment creatives.

How It Could Work

  • Users design templates with placeholders for text, images, and colors.
  • Data from monday.com is used to populate these templates dynamically.
  • Users trigger image generation via automation recipes or a button inside monday.com.
  • Generated images are stored in Monday or sent to external tools (Slack, email, Google Drive, etc.).

Would other users find this useful? If so, I’d love to hear your thoughts!
